steps.title: Sequence the past actions
steps.content: The exhibition was a completed past event in 2013. The painting had to be chosen before it was featured, so the verb should show an action completed before another past action.

steps.title: Reject wrong tenses
steps.content: A and D put the choosing in the present. C puts it in the future. The remaining verb phrase is past perfect and correctly sequences the earlier choosing before the later exhibition. The answer is B.
